requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Master Kong Iced Black Tea. The scene shows a simple tabletop setup. Use only a right hand enters frame as the only moving person or hand. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single locked shot on a matte light-gray tabletop with a soft cool blue gradient backdrop. Centered on the table is a chilled bottle of Master Kong Iced Black Tea from the reference—true-to-reference shape, amber tea visible through the plastic, yellow–orange label layout, and subtle beads of condensation already on the bottle. The camera remains steady while the bottle is the hero in crisp, cool light. After a beat, a right hand with a light gray sleeve enters from the right, grasps the bottle smoothly, lifts it slightly, and slowly rotates it to catch highlights on the condensation and the amber tea inside. The hand tilts the bottle gently toward camera for a refreshing, close, inviting angle, then returns it to the same spot, front-facing.. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: A single locked shot on a matte light-gray tabletop with a soft cool blue gradient backdrop. Centered on the table is a chilled bottle of Master Kong Iced Black Tea from the reference—true-to-reference shape, amber tea visible through the plastic, yellow–orange label layout, and subtle beads of condensation already on the bottle. The camera remains steady while the bottle is the hero in crisp, cool light. After a beat, a right hand with a light gray sleeve enters from the right, grasps the bottle smoothly, lifts it slightly, and slowly rotates it to catch highlights on the condensation and the amber tea inside. The hand tilts the bottle gently toward camera for a refreshing, close, inviting angle, then returns it to the same spot, front-facing. The hand exits frame. Hold for a brief beat on the front-facing bottle with condensation visible against the cool blue background. The entire action is calm and precise, with no other props introduced and no pouring or drinking.
requests.overlay_text:
Cool. Refreshing.
Master Kong Iced Black Tea
requests.audio_direction: Clean, cool pop beat with light high-end sparkle. Subtle whoosh when the hand lifts the bottle and a soft, satisfying set-down thump. No voiceover.
